channel.title: Thorpe Family History
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Thorpe Family History

item.title: Benjamin Tallman 1745-1820
item.description: Benjamin Tallman 1745-1820 Biographical Profile Name: Benjamin Tallman Role in this project: Older Tallman-line ancestor connected to the Thorpe pedigree timeline, the Tallman Cemetery burial group, and Fairfield County pioneer narratives.

item.title: John McIntyre Lemmon
item.description: John McIntyre Lemmon Biographical Profile Name: John McIntyre Lemmon Role in this project: Lemmon-line son of Uriah Blake Lemmon and Emily Amanda MacIntyre, documented in census summaries and a Sandusky/Ottawa County biographical sketch.

item.title: John McIntyre of Kilmoore
item.description: John McIntyre of Kilmoore Biographical Profile Name: John McIntyre Disambiguation: Of Kilmoore, County Tyrone, Ireland.

item.title: Rosanna Campbell
item.description: Rosanna Campbell Biographical Profile Name: Rosanna Campbell Role in this project: McIntyre-line spouse named in the MacIntyre book outprint and pedigree timeline extraction.

item.title: Samuel Tallman
item.description: Samuel Tallman Biographical Profile Name: Samuel Tallman Role in this project: Fairfield County, Ohio Tallman pioneer described in a local-history sketch.

item.title: Sarah Wells Tallman
item.description: Sarah Wells Tallman Biographical Profile Name: Sarah Wells Tallman Role in this project: Fairfield County, Ohio pioneer and spouse of Samuel Tallman.

item.title: William McIntyre
item.description: William McIntyre Biographical Profile Name: William McIntyre Role in this project: Compiled McIntyre-line ancestor and documented father of Major McIntyre in the MacIntyre book outprint.

item.title: Book Outprints — Grand Army Records Watson Moses Risden
item.description: Grand Army Records — Watson Moses Risden Source Shared Intake files: /mnt/g/My Drive/Thorpe Shared Intake/Book Outprints/Fairfield County outprint/Risden Watson Moses/Grand Army.pdf /mnt/g/My Drive/Thorpe Shared Intake/Book Outprints/Fairfield County outprint/Risden Watson Moses/Grand Army Risden.pd...

item.title: Book Outprints — Pioneer People of Fairfield County Ohio
item.description: Pioneer People of Fairfield County Ohio Source Publication: Pioneer Period and Pioneer People of Fairfield County, Ohio Shared Intake folder: /mnt/g/My Drive/Thorpe Shared Intake/Book Outprints/Fairfield County outprint/BOOK 00029 Pioneer People of Fairfield County Ohio/ Pages reviewed: title page a...

item.title: Book Outprints — Sandusky-Beers Lemmon John M
item.description: Sandusky-Beers — John McIntyre Lemmon Source Publication: Commemorative Biographical Record of the Counties of Sandusky and Ottawa, Ohio Publisher: J.
